mapper.sql: database_id, instance_id, collected_at, query_id, query_hash, query_text, short_query, query_type, execution_count, total_exec_time_ms, mean_exec_time_ms, min_exec_time_ms, max_exec_time_ms, stddev_exec_time_ms, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, io_blocks, shared_blks_hit, shared_blks_read, shared_blks_dirtied, shared_blks_written, planning_time_ms, execution_time_ms, username, application_name, client_addr, state, is_slow_query, cpu_rank, memory_rank, exec_time_rank, created_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_raw_metrics ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, query_id, query_hash, query_text, short_query, query_type, execution_count, total_exec_time_ms, mean_exec_time_ms, min_exec_time_ms, max_exec_time_ms, stddev_exec_time_ms, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, io_blocks, shared_blks_hit, shared_blks_read, shared_blks_dirtied, shared_blks_written, planning_time_ms, execution_time_ms, username, application_name, client_addr, state, is_slow_query, created_at ) VALUES
( #{metric.databaseId}, #{metric.instanceId}, #{metric.collectedAt}, #{metric.queryId}, #{metric.queryHash}, #{metric.queryText}, #{metric.shortQuery}, #{metric.queryType}, #{metric.executionCount}, #{metric.totalExecTimeMs}, #{metric.meanExecTimeMs}, #{metric.minExecTimeMs}, #{metric.maxExecTimeMs}, #{metric.stddevExecTimeMs}, #{metric.cpuUsagePercent}, #{metric.memoryUsageMb}, #{metric.ioBlocks}, #{metric.sharedBlksHit}, #{metric.sharedBlksRead}, #{metric.sharedBlksDirtied}, #{metric.sharedBlksWritten}, #{metric.planningTimeMs}, #{metric.executionTimeMs}, #{metric.username}, #{metric.applicationName}, #{metric.clientAddr}, #{metric.state}, #{metric.isSlowQuery}, #{metric.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '#{minutes} minutes' ORDER BY collected_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE collected_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '#{daysToKeep} days'
